01 = Less often than daily.
02 = Daily, but not constantly.
03 = All of the time. CHAR 2 x x
M0430_INTRACT_PAIN (M0430) Intractable Pain Intractable pain. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0440_LES_OPEN_WND (M0440) Skin Lesion/Open Wound Does patient have skin lesion or open wound? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0445_PRESS_ULCER (M0445) Pressure Ulcer Does patient have pressure ulcer? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x
